title: [BUG] File is not recognized (file embedded in the issue)
author: jihun-ko
body: ## 🐛 Bug Report [template.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/12138739/template.xlsx) This template is not recognized with exceljs. Exceljs thinks it's a correct file but the writeFile result is bad. ## Steps To Reproduce => Translated in English : "There is a problem with the contents of 'sample.xlsx'. Do you want to recover as much of the contents of this workbook as possible? Click [Yes] if you trust the source of this workbook." [template.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/12138739/template.xlsx) With this file, I just simply readFile and writeFile. And the file is broken immediately. This file is one of the Microsoft website's excel template, and I wanted to test the exceljs feature. ```javascript const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook(); await wb.readFile('template.xlsx'); await wb.writeFile('output.xlsx'); // breaks when open ``` ## The expected behaviour: I want to know why this file breaks so that I can know the exceljs's limitation. It can be pivot table, sheet reference, sheet styling but I don't know why. (because there's no way I can check the error log in exceljs or excel) ## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful): Don't have one.

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @lopun Maybe it is a pivot table, exceljs doesn't support pivot table. sheetName is 'Assignment Details' and there is a pivot table in it.

comments.author: dinhhai96-vn
comments.body: Maybe a few cells in the file were formatted incorrectly. You can check it again, where you have recorded data
